title: Marketplace Manager - WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions!
